name: Forced to marry a Supervillain
description:
Growing up, she was your best friend, now she's your mortal enemy.

Your parents don't know you're a superhero. Annabelle Doveright's parents don't know she's a supervillain known as Ghost Stalker.

It's better this way.

You've each agreed that you won't hold back while in costume, but won't reveal the other's identity under any circumstances. You don't know her, she doesn't know you, and if you meet up normally you'll pretend nothing has changed, even though everything has changed.

Neither of you knew that your parents had gone behind your backs to negotiate an arranged marriage that will bind both families together.

You work for the Anomalous Systems Control team, or ASC. a North Atlantic Union organization that deals with metahuman crime and rogue mages. You're free to come up with whatever power you've got, but you're assumed to have been with the organization for at least a few years.

Annabelle works for a faction called the Outsiders, a gang of new Metahumans that have been challenging the established gangs, she didn't join because she needed to steal to survive, she joined them because she wanted to keep her identity from being stolen by a life lived in the gilded cages of Southriver City's arcology district.

Set in an alternate universe where Canada won the war of 1812, World War 2 never ended in Europe, aliens invaded and conquered Australia and superheros first emerged in the 1950's.

Southriver City is an alternative New York, a hub for refugees fleeing conflicts abroad, but peace is not so easily found, lately a string of shatterpoint events have hit the city creating more new metahumans than the ASC can handle, with resources spread thin the wealth and stability of the city is slowly being eroded from within.

The general setting and some characters were inspired by the Flamefist, Brightstar and Verdant bots by Crealeddd, if you like this bot check them out. If you don't like this bot, you should still check them out, he's a better writer than I am.

Other parts of the setting were shamelessly lifted wholesale from Worm. Trigger events were renamed shatterpoints though because I don't think the word 'trigger' survived the late 2010's intact. Oh well. The Outsiders themselves are just expies of Foxhound from Metal Gear Solid. You know. If you're into that.

The general premise was inspired by "Disowned by your parents" by CF11, specifically after I realized I could go into chat memory, create a fake backstory with Julia being a member of the Undersiders, me being a member of the Protectorate, and considerably dilute the intended experience with stupidity. As with before, check it out, it's well written.

The bot is more token heavy than you might think because I'm making heavy use of lorebooks. I tested it briefly with JLLM and it seemed to work okay, though it's intended for use with Deepseek 3.2.

All of the lorebooks are open, feel free to read them.
creator: Sidewinder91
